description: Value-form match in a derived cell (§18 / §6.6). const <label> = match @level { ... } returns a string per arm; raising @level to High recomputes label to "red" and #label re-renders.
rationale: §18 value-form match returns the matched arm's value; as the RHS of a §6.6 derived it recomputes on upstream change. High -> "red". (NOTE: the same value-form match inline in a TEXT interpolation renders empty in impl#1 — see the dispatch report's bug-or-spec-gap finding; this case asserts the WORKING derived-RHS surface.)
